cells.label: past
cells.function: past tense -л (agrees in gender/number, not person)

conditioning: FUSIONAL + aspectual: tense interacts with verbal aspect (perfective/imperfective, often prefix-marked); the past agrees in gender/number, the non-past in person/number

fit_none.note: the pivot recovers the past -л and the infinitive -ть cleanly; the non-past personal endings and the aspectual system (fused/prefixal) are the expected gap

prose: rus marks tense with the past suffix -л (agreeing in gender/number: читал/читала/читали) and the infinitive -ть, atop a FUSIONAL aspectual system (perfective/imperfective, often prefix-marked по-/при-). The pivot recovers the past -л and the infinitive; the non-past personal endings and the aspect system are the expected gap. Recommendation: PROMOTE past -л + infinitive -ть; the aspect/non-past needs the declension-table + aspect-pair view.
